payload.answer: I found a conflict: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, while the new input says Sara is your niece. I will not replace the existing memory without clarification.

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement refers to Sara, matching the existing Sara, but it asserts a different family relationship to the user.

details: Conflict detected between existing and new family relationship claims.
No durable memory update committed pending clarification.

repair_options: Keep existing memory: Sara is my daughter.
Replace existing memory with: Sara is my niece.
